CustomField.description: Stores the Id of the FinServ__FinancialAccount__c source row (Retail Mortgage tier per §6.1 D3) that the parity batch synthesized into this ResidentialLoanApplication record. Acts as the external key for upsert-by-legacy-Id idempotency.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-managed by FscParityBatch. Equals the 18-char Id of the legacy FA loan record that this RLA mirrors. Do not edit.
CustomField.label: Legacy Id
